reasoned_about_structure.evidence: Starts at a midpoint, forms a multi-axis hypothesis, increases both lr and bs progressively to the optimum; understands interaction.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: Clear progression: midpoint -> better bs? -> better lr at best bs? Each testable and targeted.

exploration_quality.evidence: Reaches the true optimum at exp 7, probes neighbors to confirm; 8 of 50, all informative.

bifurcation_point: Experiment 5 (lr=0.003906, bs=1024): increases bs holding lr, observes improvement, commits to testing higher lr at improved bs.
bifurcation_reasoning: After a midpoint, hypothesizes both axes improve and designs incremental tests; correctly infers further lr optimization at the improved bs - semantically correct.
justification: Structured, hypothesis-driven, semantically sound; reaches the true optimum in 8 experiments; outcome aligns with reasoning.
